title: Washington Implements New COVID Restrictions
excerpt: Governor Montgomery has implemented new COVID regulations.
body: The State of Washington, starting within the next three weeks, will begin a new series of mandates to assist in the mitigation of the COVID-19 crisis. This includes a masking mandate in public facilities, a six-feet-apart social distancing standard, the migration of education to a virtual model, a 10 PM Curfew, and a ban on large social gatherings of more than 20 people in public spaces. Washington has also pledged a substantial, five billion dollar funding figure from the funds of the Department of Health and Human Services for the purposes of researching and developing the coronavirus vaccine, to be used in consultation with universities and federal authorities.

title: Governor Montgomery Announces New Congressional Boundaries
excerpt: Governor Montgomery announces new redistricting effort, securing 10 Democratic congressional districts.
body: In response to a large nationwide gerrymandering campaign by either side, Governor Montgomery announced a new redistricting initiative today to ensure a fair topline federal result by giving Washington ten democratic Congressional districts. This will assist in ensuring fair representation for all Americans in Congress.
